hero.badge: Free to start — no credit card
hero.subtitle_1: Answer 8 questions. Get a week-by-week action plan to earn your first money online — matched to your skills, time, and budget.
hero.subtitle_2: Not a course. Not generic advice. A real plan built for your situation, with an AI coach that guides you every step of the way.
hero.tagline: 2 minutes. No credit card. No fluff.

social_proof.headline: Real people. Real results.
social_proof.subheadline: 1,000+ people already building income with HustleGuide

problem.headline: You want to earn online.
problem.headline_2: So why haven't you started yet?
problem.subtitle: It's not motivation you're missing. It's a clear, specific plan built for your actual situation.
problem.pain_1_title: Generic advice that ignores your situation
problem.pain_1_desc: Every guide assumes you have 40 hours a week, €5,000 to invest, and live in the US.
problem.pain_2_title: No clear starting point or step-by-step plan
problem.pain_2_desc: "Build an audience" is not a plan. You need specific tasks for specific days.
problem.pain_3_title: Wasted months on the wrong thing
problem.pain_3_desc: Most people try 3 different paths before finding one that actually fits their life.

how_it_works.headline: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: From zero to a personalized income plan in under 2 minutes.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: 8 quick questions: your available hours, budget, existing skills, and how fast you need income. Takes 2 minutes.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: We score 40+ online income paths against your profile and show the best fits — with realistic earnings and timelines.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Each week you get specific daily tasks, scripts, and tools. Complete it, check in, and your next week adapts to your actual progress.

features.headline: Everything you need.
features.subtitle: No fluff. No upsells. Just a clear plan and a coach to help you execute it.
features.f1_desc: We score 40+ online income paths against your hours, budget, skills, and goals — and show you what actually fits.
features.f2_desc: Each week gives you specific actions, real scripts, and the exact tools to use. Not "build an audience" type advice.
features.f3_desc: After each week you check in. Your next week is generated from your actual results — not a template.
features.f4_desc: Ask anything, anytime. Your coach knows your path, your current week, and your specific situation.

faq.headline: Questions? We have answers.
faq.a1: Yes. Free gives you 1 guide per month with access to the first 2 weeks and limited AI coaching. Pro gives you up to 3 guides per month, all 12 weeks, and unlimited AI coaching.
faq.q2: How is this different from just asking ChatGPT?
faq.a2: ChatGPT gives you generic advice. HustleGuide builds a plan around your specific hours, budget, location, and skills. And every week it updates based on your actual progress. It's a roadmap that moves with you, not a chat window.
faq.q3: What if I pick the wrong path?
faq.a3: Retake the quiz and generate a new set of matches. Your situation changes and your plan should change with it.
faq.q4: How long until I make money?
faq.a4: Depends on the path and how much time you put in. We give honest, realistic estimates. Most people see first results somewhere between week 3 and week 8.
faq.a5: Yes, one click from your settings. No questions, no guilt trips, no retention flows.

final_cta.headline: Your first week's tasks are waiting.
final_cta.subtitle: Sign up free. Answer 8 questions. Get your personalized roadmap in minutes.

quiz.label: Question {{n}}
quiz.analyzing_sub: Finding the perfect hustle path for you
quiz.q_hours: How many hours per week can you realistically dedicate?
quiz.q_timeline: How quickly do you need to earn money?
quiz.q_budget: What is your budget to invest to get started?
quiz.q_skills: What skills do you already have?
quiz.q_tried: Have you tried making money online before? What happened?
quiz.tried_ph: e.g. tried dropshipping but gave up after 2 weeks
quiz.q_preferences: What kind of work do you prefer?
quiz.q_hates: What do you absolutely hate doing?

freelance_writing.name: Freelance Writing
freelance_writing.desc: Write articles, blog posts, and web content for businesses and publications.

copywriting.name: Copywriting
copywriting.desc: Write persuasive sales pages, email sequences, and ads that drive revenue.

social_media_manager.name: Social Media Manager
social_media_manager.desc: Run Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn accounts for businesses that don't have time.

graphic_design.name: Graphic Design
graphic_design.desc: Create logos, brand identities, social graphics, and marketing materials.

video_editing.name: Video Editing
video_editing.desc: Edit YouTube videos, short-form reels, and brand ads for creators and businesses.

ux_design.name: UX Design
ux_design.desc: Design how apps and websites feel to use — wireframes, prototypes, and user flows.

web_development.name: Web Development
web_development.desc: Build websites and web apps for clients. One of the most in-demand freelance skills globally.

no_code_app_building.name: No-Code App Building
no_code_app_building.desc: Build web apps and automations using Bubble, Webflow, or Make — no coding required.

seo_consulting.name: SEO Consulting
seo_consulting.desc: Help businesses rank higher on Google through content, site structure, and backlink strategy.

ai_automation_consulting.name: AI Automation Consulting
ai_automation_consulting.desc: Help businesses build AI-powered workflows using ChatGPT, Make, and Zapier.

virtual_assistant.name: Virtual Assistant
virtual_assistant.desc: Handle emails, scheduling, research, and admin tasks remotely for entrepreneurs.

data_entry.name: Data Entry
data_entry.desc: Input, clean, and organize data for businesses. Simple to start with no skills needed.

bookkeeping.name: Bookkeeping
bookkeeping.desc: Track income and expenses for small businesses. Steady recurring work once you have clients.

tutoring.name: Tutoring
tutoring.desc: Teach any subject one-on-one to students in your area.

online_tutoring.name: Online Tutoring
online_tutoring.desc: Teach students remotely via video call on platforms like Preply or Superprof.

language_teaching.name: Language Teaching
language_teaching.desc: Teach your native language to learners worldwide on platforms like iTalki or Preply.

fitness_coaching.name: Fitness Coaching
fitness_coaching.desc: Coach clients on exercise and body transformation online or in person.

nutrition_coaching.name: Nutrition Coaching
nutrition_coaching.desc: Help clients improve their diet through personalised meal plans and accountability.

career_coaching.name: Career Coaching
career_coaching.desc: Help people land jobs, get promotions, or switch industries with CVs and interview prep.

business_consulting.name: Business Consulting
business_consulting.desc: Advise small businesses on strategy, operations, marketing, and growth.

youtube_channel.name: YouTube Channel
youtube_channel.desc: Build an audience on YouTube and monetise through ads, sponsorships, and digital products.

podcast.name: Podcast
podcast.desc: Record audio episodes on a niche and monetise through sponsorships or listener support.

newsletter.name: Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Write a regular email newsletter and monetise via sponsorships or paid subscriptions.

digital_products.name: Digital Products
digital_products.desc: Create and sell ebooks, templates, or mini-courses. Build once, sell forever.

print_on_demand.name: Print on Demand
print_on_demand.desc: Design T-shirts and prints manufactured only when ordered — no inventory needed.

etsy_shop.name: Etsy Shop
etsy_shop.desc: Sell handmade crafts, digital downloads, or vintage items on Etsy's marketplace.

dropshipping.name: Dropshipping
dropshipping.desc: Sell products online without holding inventory — suppliers ship directly to customers.

amazon_fba.name: Amazon FBA
amazon_fba.desc: Source physical products and sell through Amazon's warehouse and fulfilment network.

stock_photography.name: Stock Photography
stock_photography.desc: Upload photos to Shutterstock or Getty and earn royalties each time they're licensed.

photography.name: Photography
photography.desc: Offer professional photography for events, portraits, brands, and real estate.

voiceover_work.name: Voiceover Work
voiceover_work.desc: Record your voice for ads, audiobooks, and e-learning courses. Just a mic and a quiet room.

translation_services.name: Translation Services
translation_services.desc: Translate documents, websites, and content between languages.

local_arbitrage.name: Local Arbitrage
local_arbitrage.desc: Buy underpriced items at garage sales and flip them for profit on eBay or Vinted.

vintage_reselling.name: Vintage Reselling
vintage_reselling.desc: Source vintage clothing from charity shops and resell on Vinted, Depop, or eBay.

dog_walking.name: Dog Walking
dog_walking.desc: Walk dogs for busy pet owners in your local area. Zero setup cost — just show up.

cleaning_service.name: Cleaning Service
cleaning_service.desc: Offer home or office cleaning to local clients with recurring weekly bookings.

food_delivery.name: Food Delivery
food_delivery.desc: Deliver food for Uber Eats or Deliveroo on your own schedule. Earn your first money today.

handyman_services.name: Handyman Services
handyman_services.desc: Offer repairs, furniture assembly, and odd jobs to local homeowners.

gardening.name: Gardening
gardening.desc: Mow lawns, plant borders, and maintain gardens for local homeowners.

personal_shopping.name: Personal Shopping
personal_shopping.desc: Shop for groceries, gifts, or outfits for time-poor clients locally or online.
